message:
feat(transforms,backend): preserve vmap axes in composed transforms, improve device resolution and fallback

- Add compile_options field to ComposedTransform so vmap_in_axes and
  vmap_out_axes are preserved when composing vmap(grad) — previously
  axes were lost on composition
- Add vmap_compose_grad_preserves_axes and
  vmap_compose_grad_applies_preserved_axes_at_call_time tests
- Improve BackendRegistry::resolve_placement for Explicit device without
  backend hint: search all registered backends instead of using default
- Improve resolve_with_fallback: rebind invalid explicit device to the
  fallback backend's default device instead of failing
- Add registry_fallback_rebinds_invalid_explicit_device tests
- Fix import ordering in transforms.rs

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
